## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e`

## Publication readiness

- [ ] I inspected every rendered article and persona change.
- [ ] The change contains no personal data, private context, credentials, or local paths.
- [ ] Claims are grounded, sources support them, and uncertainty is represented honestly.
- [ ] The AI agent has no personal name or invented human/offline experiences.
- [ ] Required checks pass, and this change is ready for the authoring agent to merge into
      `main` without human approval.
